title: Overflow Is My Natural Daily State
subtitle: An affirmation for anchoring overflow as an expectation rather than a surprise
excerpt: A brief affirmation for shifting overflow from an occasional financial windfall to the ordinary daily experience. The statement names financial plenty as the baseline, not the exception. Say it in the morning before the day's numbers have a chance to set the tone.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 63 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A short affirmation for the morning. Say it before the day's demands narrow the picture. The statement names overflow as the natural expectation. Not because circumstances are always flush, but because the pattern being practised is one of plenty.
Use it before checking any accounts or reviewing any finances. The affirmation sets the internal state; the external picture comes next. The sequence matters.
Overflow is my natural daily state. I wake up knowing there is more than enough. I move through today from that place.

Say it three times, ideally before getting out of bed. The 'I move through today from that place' closing is a practical instruction. It names the state as the ground you stand on when you open the laptop or check the balance, not as the reward you receive after.
Adapted from Day 63 of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
